---
title: "*eCerto* (Statistics for CRM production)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: false
    embed-resources: true
    standalone: true
    css: "helpstyle.css"
---

```{r child = 'start.Rmd'}
```

```{r child = 'certification.Rmd'}
```

```{r child = 'homogeneity.Rmd'}
```

```{r child = 'stability.Rmd'}
```

```{r child = 'certified_values.Rmd'}
```

---

```{r child = 'lts.Rmd'}
```

```{r child = 'validation.Rmd'}
```
